block_00: How to choose assets for trading?
block_01: When deciding which stocks and industry sectors may be suitable for you, technical and fundamental factors are extremely important to consider. However, there are several ways to find assets that may be of interest for traders.
block_02: In this article we will be looking into drawing inspiration from famous investors’ choices, staying on top of emerging trends as well as utilizing personal knowledge and competence to choose stocks for trading.
block_03: If you are struggling to decide on the contents of your trading portfolio, you may consider exploring these options that might give you a new perspective on things.
